However, his already aligned baseline (-327) toward the adversarial goal (-1) and moderate trust (74th pct Agreeableness trust facet) leave a small window for the fear appeal to reinforce doubt by linking mainstream journalism to personal safety threats, resulting in a minor downward shift of 9 points rather than full resistance.
